sections.heading: FAQs to Target More Keywords
paragraphs: Which font works best for thumbnails? Bold sans-serif fonts like Montserrat or Bebas Neue are easiest to read.
What aspect ratio should I use? 16:9 (1280x720) works best for YouTube and blog covers.
Which AI tool gives the cleanest results? Leonardo and Firefly give cleaner text space; Bing gives fast variations.
